summary: Iteration 172: Orphan Admin Features - All 3 requirements implemented and verified. Backend tests: 14/15 passed (1 skipped - expected). Self-assignment blocking confirmed via code review and API test. Re-run toggle and Unassign endpoints working. UI components properly implemented with data-testid attributes.

features_tested: POST /api/admin/orphans/rerun-toggle with enabled:true - PASS (turns toggle on)
POST /api/admin/orphans/rerun-toggle with enabled:false - PASS (turns toggle off)
POST /api/admin/orphans/rerun-execute blocked when toggle is off - PASS (returns 403)
POST /api/admin/orphans/rerun-execute allowed when toggle is on - PASS (batch processes orphans)
POST /api/admin/orphans/unassign/{user_id} - PASS (disconnects user from upline, preserves downline)
Self-assignment blocked in manual assign - PASS (returns 400 with 'Self-assignment is prohibited')
Code review: assign_orphan_to_recipient has self-assignment block - PASS
Code review: auto_assign_single_orphan has self-assignment check and retry - PASS

code_review_findings.self_assignment_block_in_assign_orphan_t: Lines 348-356 - HARD BLOCK with orphan_user_id == recipient_id check at top of function
code_review_findings.self_assignment_block_in_auto_assign_sin: Lines 496-509 - Checks if recipient matches orphan and retries up to 10 times
code_review_findings.rerun_toggle_endpoints: Lines 711-791 in admin_orphan_diamond.py - Toggle status, enable/disable, execute with guard
code_review_findings.unassign_endpoint: Lines 796-889 in admin_orphan_diamond.py - Full L1/L2 disconnection, count decrement, downline preserved

frontend_verification.unassign_buttons: AdminOrphans.jsx line 605 - data-testid='unassign-{user_id}' present for assigned orphans
frontend_verification.tabs: AdminOrphans.jsx line 482 - data-testid='tab-{id}' for queue, parents, trends, audit tabs

backend_tests.skipped_reason: test_unassign_user_no_upline_returns_400 - No unassigned orphan without upline found in test data

critical_code_review_comments: Self-assignment blocking is properly implemented with HARD BLOCK in both assign_orphan_to_recipient and auto_assign_single_orphan functions
Re-run Auto-Assign toggle uses admin_config collection and guards rerun-execute with 403 when disabled
Unassign endpoint properly removes L1/L2 links, decrements counts on parent, preserves downline subtree
Frontend has proper data-testid attributes for testing: rerun-toggle, unassign-{user_id}, tab-{id}

success_rate.frontend: N/A - Admin page requires admin authentication to test UI

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 orphan admin features implemented and working: 1) Self-assignment block in both assign functions, 2) Re-run Auto-Assign toggle with status/enable/execute endpoints, 3) Unassign user endpoint. Admin page requires admin credentials to test UI but all backend APIs verified working. Frontend code has proper data-testid attributes.

1_block_self_assignment.test_result: Self-assignment returns 400 with 'Self-assignment is prohibited' message

2_rerun_auto_assign_toggle.restrictions: Toggle blocks execute with 403 when disabled

3_unassign_user_action.behavior: Removes L1/L2 upline links, decrements parent counts, preserves downline subtree
